description: As part of a planned drill, the SRE team needs to test the disaster recovery plan by failing over to a secondary data center.

nodes.task_description: Announce the planned disaster recovery test to all internal stakeholders.

expected_outcome.value: All teams are aware of the upcoming DR test.

nodes.task_description: Execute the script to fail over production traffic and services to the secondary data center.
Run a series of health checks to verify that the application is fully functional in the secondary data center.

expected_outcome.value: All health checks pass, confirming the DR site is operational.

nodes.task_description: After the test, fail back to the primary data center.
